query:
SELECT 
  DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as timestamp,
  COUNT(*) as quantidade
FROM interacoes i
JOIN users u ON i.corretorId = u.id
WHERE u.name = 'Andrew'
  AND i.tipo = 'whatsapp'
  AND DATE(i.createdAt) = CURDATE()
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
ORDER BY timestamp DESC;
